deletion.title: Delete Account
deletion.description: You can request the deletion of your account. The property manager must confirm the request first.
deletion.hasActiveLease: Your account cannot be deleted while an active tenancy exists. Please contact your property manager.
deletion.alreadyRequested: Your deletion request has been submitted and is awaiting confirmation by the administration.
deletion.confirmBody: Your account will only be deleted after the property manager confirms the request. You will receive an email with the result.
deletion.error: Error submitting request. Please try again.
deletion.rejectBody: You can optionally provide the user with a reason for the rejection.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.s1Body: The data controller for this website is ImmoManage, Switzerland. Contact: info@immo-manage.ch
datenschutz.s2Title: 2. Collection and Processing of Personal Data
datenschutz.s2Body: We collect personal data (name, email address, and optionally a message) when you fill out our demo request form or register as a user. This data is used solely to process your request or to provide our service.
datenschutz.s3Body: Processing is carried out on the basis of your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR) or for the performance of a contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR). For users in Switzerland, the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP) also applies.
datenschutz.s4Body: Your data is not sold to third parties. To provide our service, we use the following processors, with whom data processing agreements are in place: Vercel Inc. (hosting, USA), Turso / ChiselStrike Inc. (database, EU/USA), Resend Inc. (email delivery, USA). Data transfers to the USA are based on EU Standard Contractual Clauses (Art. 46 GDPR) and the Swiss-U.S. Data Privacy Framework.
datenschutz.s5Body: Personal data is only stored for as long as necessary for the respective purposes or as required by statutory retention obligations.
datenschutz.s6Body: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, and data portability. Please contact info@immo-manage.ch. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.
datenschutz.s7Body: We use only technically necessary session cookies for authentication. No tracking or marketing cookies are used. No consent is therefore required.
datenschutz.s8Body: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy as needed. The current version is always available on this page.

impressum.title: Imprint
impressum.liabilityBody: The content of this website has been created with the utmost care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the information provided.
impressum.hostingBody: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 Pine Street, Suite 701, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA.

pricing.heroSubtitle: Property management software for Switzerland — professional, digital, Swiss-compliant. All prices in CHF incl. VAT. Cancel monthly.
pricing.heroComparison: Compared to competitors: ImmoManage is up to 60% cheaper.
pricing.compareSubtitle: Monthly costs for a typical management of 15–20 units (CHF)
pricing.compareDisclaimer: * Prices based on publicly available information from providers (as of 2026). No warranty.
pricing.faq1q: Can I cancel at any time?
pricing.faq1a: Yes. All plans are cancellable monthly — no notice periods or minimum terms.
pricing.faq2a: No. The listed price is everything. No setup fees, no per-unit costs.
pricing.faq3a: Yes. We generate ISO 20022-compliant QR-Invoices with reference number (QRR) per SIX standard.
pricing.faq4q: What happens if I get more units?
pricing.faq4a: You can upgrade at any time — the new plan applies from the next month.
pricing.faq5q: How long is the free trial?
pricing.faq5a: The Starter plan is free for 3 months. After that it costs CHF 19/month — cancellable monthly.
pricing.modalSubtitle: Create account and start immediately — in under 1 minute.
pricing.modalSubtitleEnterprise: We will contact you within 24 hours.
pricing.modalSubtitleTrial: 3 months free — no credit card required.
pricing.consentText: I have read the {privacy} and agree to the processing of my data.
pricing.errorContact: Thank you! We will contact you within 24 hours.
pricing.metaTitle: Pricing – Swiss Property Management Software | ImmoManage
pricing.metaDesc: ImmoManage: Affordable property management software for Switzerland from CHF 19/mo. Rental contracts, QR invoices, tenant portal, utility billing. For private landlords and property managers. 3 months free trial.

hero.headline: No more spreadsheet chaos.
hero.subtext: The Swiss solution for property managers and private landlords — simple, complete, Swiss-compliant.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.item1Desc: Broken formulas, conflicting versions — hours wasted every month.
problem.item2Desc: Every tenant, every month, manually. Hours you simply don't have.
problem.item3Title: Calling tenants instead of going digital
problem.item3Desc: Repair requests by phone, documents by post — even though there's a better way.

features.title: Everything you need — in one solution
features.f1Desc: All your properties at a glance. Status, vacancy, photos.
features.f2Desc: Contact data, lease agreements, deposits, tenant handover wizard.
features.f4Desc: Tickets, documents, messages — your tenants handle everything digitally.
features.f5Desc: Automated support for your daily property management tasks.
features.f6Desc: Swiss templates (DE + FR), digital filing, everything on demand.
features.f7Desc: Room-by-room documentation for move-in/move-out with photos and digital signature — paperless and legally compliant.
features.f8Desc: Automatically allocate utility costs to tenants, generate PDF billing per tenant — Swiss-compliant template included.

forWhom.title: Who is ImmoManage for?
segment2Points: Easy to get started, no IT knowledge needed

demo.title: See it for yourself
demo.subtitle: We'll show you ImmoManage in a short demo — free and no commitment.
demo.messagePlaceholder: What do you want to manage? (optional)
demo.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: The Swiss solution for modern property management.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 50 property managers and private owners trust ImmoManage.
testimonials.t1Quote: Finally no more Excel spreadsheets. QR invoices are generated automatically and tenants can report damage directly in the portal. Saves me at least 3 hours a week.
testimonials.t2Quote: I manage 5 apartments as a side job. With ImmoManage I have everything under control — leases, documents, billing. Getting started took 20 minutes.
testimonials.t3Quote: The AI assistant helped me draft a legally sound tenant letter. The platform thinks ahead — at a price where other providers haven't even started.
